message: feat(history): render diffs without external command (beads_rust-dxr9)

 {"id":"beads_rust-dwec","title":"Fix duplicate unreadable AGENTS.md read in agents detection","description":"`src/cli/commands/agents.rs` re-reads an unreadable AGENTS.md path on the error branch in `check_agent_file`, duplicating failing I/O and obscuring the original read error. Capture the first error directly and add regression coverage for unreadable-file detection.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-03-11T05:56:56.649009983Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-11T06:23:36.152492642Z","closed_at":"2026-03-11T06:23:36.150091045Z","close_reason":"Fixed duplicate unreadable-file read and added regression coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"beads_rust-dxj","title":"Phase 5: Polish & Extensions","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:32:56.124743210Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T07:50:02.420033596Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T07:50:02.420033596Z","close_reason":"Duplicate of Phase 5 epic beads_rust-gs0","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"compacted_at_commit":"","original_size":0}
-{"id":"beads_rust-dxr9","title":"Track: replace external diff dependency with pure-Rust diff","description":"SUBTASK 7.2 (DEFERRED FEATURE): src/cli/commands/history.rs:443 contains:
  "Let us shell out to diff -u for now as it is standard on linux/mac."

CURRENT BEHAVIOR: The br history diff command shells out to the system diff -u binary via std::process::Command::new("diff"). This works on Linux and macOS but fails on Windows without WSL. It also contradicts the projects self-contained philosophy (no external tool dependencies).

DESIRED BEHAVIOR: Use a pure-Rust diff library to compute unified diffs internally. Candidates:
- similar crate (most popular, supports unified diff format)
- imara-diff crate (fast, used by gitoxide)
- dissimilar crate (by dtolnay, simpler API)

IMPLEMENTATION CONSIDERATIONS:
- The diff output is displayed to the user in terminal, so it needs to produce unified diff format for familiarity
- The similar crate has TextDiff::from_lines().unified_diff() which produces exactly the right format
- Adding a dependency increases compile time and binary size — evaluate if the diff feature is used enough to justify it
- The current code already handles exit code interpretation (DiffCommandStatus enum) which would be simplified with an internal implementation
- Consider making this a feature flag to keep the binary small for users who do not use history diff

PRIORITY: P4/backlog because the history diff command is a low-frequency diagnostic tool, and most users are on Linux/macOS where diff -u works fine.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:09:28.620081349Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:33:41.593235858Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":245,"issue_id":"beads_rust-dxr9","author":"ubuntu","text":"DEPENDENCY EVALUATION: The similar crate adds ~50KB to binary size (acceptable for a CLI tool). It is well-maintained (by mitsuhiko) and already used by cargo, insta, and other Rust ecosystem tools. If binary size is a concern, feature-gate it behind a history-diff feature flag.","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:10:56Z"}]}

CURRENT BEHAVIOR: The br history diff command shells out to the system diff -u binary via std::process::Command::new("diff"). This works on Linux and macOS but fails on Windows without WSL. It also contradicts the projects self-contained philosophy (no external tool dependencies).

DESIRED BEHAVIOR: Use a pure-Rust diff library to compute unified diffs internally. Candidates:
- similar crate (most popular, supports unified diff format)
- imara-diff crate (fast, used by gitoxide)
- dissimilar crate (by dtolnay, simpler API)

IMPLEMENTATION CONSIDERATIONS:
- The diff output is displayed to the user in terminal, so it needs to produce unified diff format for familiarity
- The similar crate has TextDiff::from_lines().unified_diff() which produces exactly the right format
- Adding a dependency increases compile time and binary size — evaluate if the diff feature is used enough to justify it
- The current code already handles exit code interpretation (DiffCommandStatus enum) which would be simplified with an internal implementation
- Consider making this a feature flag to keep the binary small for users who do not use history diff
